member.name: T:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication and user registration endpoints

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.LoginRequest,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticate and receive JWT tokens

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.RegisterRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register a new user (and tenant if new subdomain)

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Refresh(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Logout(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revoke refresh token (logout)

member.name: T:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController
member.summary: Issue management — full CRUD, transitions, comments, bulk ops, and IQL search

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single issue with all details

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.GetByProject(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List issues for a project

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.GetBacklog(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get backlog for a project (issues not in any sprint)

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Search(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.IssueSearchRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Search issues using IQL (Internal Query Language)
member.remarks: IQL Examples: - `project = DIG AND status IN ("In Progress", "In Review")` - `assignee = currentUser() AND updated >= -7d` - `issuetype = Bug AND priority IN (Critical, Blocker)`

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Create(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.CreateIssueRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new issue

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Update(System.Int32,Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.UpdateIssueRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Full update of an issue (use PATCH for partial)

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Patch(System.Int32,Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.UpdateIssueRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Partial update (same as PUT in this implementation)

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Transition(System.Int32,Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.TransitionIssueRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a workflow transition on an issue

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete an issue

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.Bulk(Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.BulkIssueRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk update up to 50 issues at once

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.AddComment(System.Int32,Digiprise.PMS.Contracts.Requests.CreateCommentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a comment to an issue

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.GetComments(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all comments for an issue

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.IssuesController.GetWithBaseline(System.Int32,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get issues with baseline comparison

member.summary: Close a sprint and record velocity

member.summary: Get burndown chart data for a sprint

member.summary: Dashboard widgets and summary data

member.summary: Health check endpoints for load balancers and orchestrators

member.summary: Liveness probe — is the process alive?

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Controllers.HealthController.Ready
member.summary: Readiness probe — is the app ready to serve traffic?

member.name: T:Digiprise.PMS.API.Hubs.PmsHub
member.summary: PmsHub — tenant-scoped real-time hub for board updates, notifications, and live collaboration. Groups: board:{boardId}, project:{projectId}, user:{userId}

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Hubs.PmsHub.JoinBoard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Join a board room to receive live card updates

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Hubs.PmsHub.LeaveBoard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Leave a board room

member.name: M:Digiprise.PMS.API.Hubs.PmsHub.JoinProject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Join a project room

member.name: T:Digiprise.PMS.API.Hubs.PmsHub.Events
member.summary: Broadcast issue status change (called server-side via IHubContext)

member.name: T:Digiprise.PMS.API.Middleware.JwtAuthenticationHandler
member.summary: Custom JWT authentication handler — uses only built-in ASP.NET 8 types. No Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer NuGet package needed.
